authority.source: Combat Styles Encyclopedia plus verified Adventures in Glorantha gap-fill

source_ref.notes: Evidence artifacts contain bounded row facts only; full page text, source PDF, and rendered page images remain uncommitted.

field_attestation.note: CSE evidence promotes app-facing combat style names, weapons, and traits only. Restrictions and notes remain app-derived fields for later global provenance classification.

supplemental_sources.scope: Sartarite Esrolian Cohort style missing from current CSE-derived rows

styles.name: Alynx Brother
styles.restrictions: Herder, Hunter or Scout career only

styles.name: Upland Crofter
styles.restrictions: Herder, Hunter or Scout career only

styles.name: Esrolian Cohort
styles.notes: AiG-verified gap-fill: this Sartarite style is visible on AiG PDF page 37 but absent from the current CSE-derived row set.

styles.name: Wolf Hunter
styles.notes: Can be used in either human or lupine forms; wolf form also gains Unarmed Prowess.

styles.name: Pol-Joni
styles.notes: May select weapons from an alternate Praxian tribe or Orlanthi combat style.
